query:
INSERT INTO savedQuotes (
  quoteName, company,
  clientCompany, clientContact, clientAddress1, clientCity, clientState, clientZip, clientPhone, clientEmail,
  facilityId, selectedFacility, monthlyPallets, monthlyTurns, sqFtPerPallet, stackHeight,
  laborRate, taxRate, fullyLoadedLaborRate, inboundMinutes, outboundMinutes,
  storageMargin, handlingInMargin, handlingOutMargin, monthlyStorageMinimum,
  pickType, monthlyOrders, casesPerOrder, labelsPerOrder,
  casePickRate, layerPickRate,
  palletSupplyFee, shrinkWrapFee, labelingFee, orderProcessingFee, cancellationFee,
  casePickMargin, palletSupplyMargin, shrinkWrapMargin, labelingMargin, orderProcessingMargin, cancellationMargin,
  storageRateOverride, handlingInRateOverride, handlingOutRateOverride,
  freightLanes,
  quoteValidDays, paymentTerms, minimumCommitment, customDisclosures,
  createdBy
) VALUES (
  'Cornerstone Systems - Warehouse Services', 'L&M',
  'Cornerstone Systems Inc.', 'Marc Purnell', '3250 Players Club Parkway', 'Memphis', 'TN', '38125', '(901) 842-0660', 'invoices@cornerstone-systems.com',
  'PA-1151', 'PA-1151', 272, 100, 48, 1,
  1500, 50, 2250, 15, 15,
  35, 30, 30, 0,
  'full', 272, 0, 0,
  40, 30,
  1200, 400, 20, 0, 0,
  30, 30, 30, 30, 30, 30,
  3500, 800, 800,
  '[{"type":"outbound","origin":"Edison NJ Rail Ramp","destination":"KLS DC5, NE Philadelphia PA","rate":769.65,"pallets":21,"weight":40000},{"type":"outbound","origin":"PA-1151 Bristol PA","destination":"PLCB Delivery (Expedited)","rate":750,"pallets":21,"weight":40000},{"type":"outbound","origin":"PA-1151 Bristol PA","destination":"Delaware Delivery","rate":850,"pallets":21,"weight":40000},{"type":"inbound","origin":"Edison NJ Rail Ramp (MGX)","destination":"PA-1151 Bristol PA","rate":16,"pallets":1,"weight":2000}]',
  30, 'Net 30', '68 boxcars (272 loads) Nov 2024 - Oct 2025', 'Transportation: Base rate $615.72 + 25% fuel surcharge ($153.93) = $769.65 all-inclusive. Fuel surcharge tied to DOE PADD 1B Central Atlantic weekly diesel price, adjusts 0.5% per $0.10 change from $3.85-$3.94 bracket.\n\nCross-Dock: $16.00/pallet (MGX Edison to L&M facilities).\n\nPLCB Rework (PA-510): Repack $20.00/case, Shrink Wrap $4.00/pallet, Unload refused $0.60/case, Case Destruction $3.50/case.\n\nSlipsheet Unload: $0.20/case. Ad-hoc services may include weekend/short notice premiums.\n\nService Level: 98.5% on-time delivery commitment.\n\nStorage Rate: $35.00/pallet/month. Handling In: $8.00/pallet. Handling Out: $8.00/pallet. Pallet Supply: $12.00/pallet.',
  'System'
);
